data.title: Viewpoint: Hong Kong proposes the concept of "specified stablecoin", corresponding to the value-anchored regulatory model
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: 21st Century Business Herald published an analysis article titled "Hong Kong "bets" on stablecoins: a key move for an international financial center", which pointed out that Hong Kong proposed the concept of "specified stablecoins", which corresponds to the "value-anchored supervision" model. The concept of "specified stablecoins" refers to stablecoins that maintain stable value by reference to one or more official currencies, or units of calculation or forms of economic value storage designated by the HKMA. Supervision focuses on two types of activities: issuing specified stablecoins in Hong Kong; or issuing specified stablecoins outside Hong Kong but claiming to be anchored to the value of the Hong Kong dollar. This design ensures that stablecoins pegged to the Hong Kong dollar are regulated, while leaving some room for other stablecoins.

data.title: Trend Research withdraws another 4,000 ETH from exchanges, with a current total holding value of over $347 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the on-chain data @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, Trend Research, an affiliate of LD Capital, withdrew another 4,000 ETH from the exchange half an hour ago, which is equivalent to about 9.97 million US dollars at the current price. As of now, the address still holds about 139,417 ETH, with a total value of about 347 million US dollars.

data.title: Ether.fi Discord Compromised by Hackers
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the official Discord server of ether.fi has been compromised by hackers who posted fraudulent links. The ether.fi team has identified the breach and is urging users to avoid interacting with any links shared on the Discord platform. The team is actively investigating the incident and plans to provide an official update soon.

data.title: Hong Kong's Strategic Move on Stablecoins: A Key Financial Decision
data.description: According to PANews, a report by 21st Century Business Herald analyzes Hong Kong's strategic approach to stablecoins, highlighting the concept of 'designated stablecoins' and its regulatory implications. The 'designated stablecoins' are pegged to one or more official currencies or units of account specified by the Monetary Authority to maintain stable value. The regulatory focus is on two activities: issuing designated stablecoins within Hong Kong and those issued outside but claiming to be pegged to the Hong Kong dollar. This framework ensures that stablecoins linked to the Hong Kong dollar are regulated while allowing room for other stablecoins.

data.title: ether.fi official Discord was hacked
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ether Fi's official Discord was hacked and published fake content with scam links. Ether Fi calls on users not to interact with any links in Discord. The team is investigating the matter and will provide an official update as soon as possible.

data.title: Binance Alpha launches AB (AB), users with at least 225 points can claim 9,882 AB airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance Alpha has launched AB (AB). Qualified users with at least 225 Binance Alpha points can claim an airdrop of 9,882 AB tokens on the Alpha event page starting at 6:00 UTC on June 7, 2025. Claiming the AB airdrop will consume 15 Biannce Alpha points. Users must confirm the claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours, otherwise it will be deemed as giving up the claim.

data.title: DigiPower X Launches Stock Offering to Raise $100 Million to Expand Bitcoin Mining Capacity
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed DigiPower X announced the launch of a stock issuance plan to raise $100 million by selling voting shares to support its strategic roadmap. The new funds are intended to be used for general corporate purposes, including funding for ongoing operations and/or working capital needs, and completing the construction of the company's data center to expand Bitcoin mining capabilities. In addition, DigiPower X also announced unaudited Bitcoin mining data as of May 31, 2025, which disclosed that mining output last month was approximately 35 BTC, worth approximately $3.7 million, and that it held a total of approximately $9.3 million in cash, Bitcoin and cash deposits.

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-says-he-plans-to-fire-fed-chair-powell/

data.title: Analysis: Trump's second son's official announcement of cooperation with TRUMP failed to drive prices up, and the community questioned his ability to "call orders"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump's second son Eric Trump announced this morning that he has reached a cooperation with the Meme coin project TRUMP and WLFI and plans to hold a large number of TRUMP tokens in its long-term treasury. After the news came out, the price of TRUMP briefly increased by 6.4%, but then quickly fell back, so some crypto communities questioned that the news failed to effectively promote a stronger price increase. Analyst Pluid said: "Eric Trump's 'calling' did not make TRUMP rise, which is definitely not a good sign." (Cointelgraph)

data.title: Ethereum's Role in Stablecoins and DeFi Gains Attention Amid Market Developments
data.description: According to Odaily, Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, recently shared his views on the X platform, highlighting Ethereum's foundational role in stablecoins, risk-weighted assets, DeFi, NFTs, decentralized social networks, and prediction markets. Despite these contributions, Tomaino noted that the market often overlooks Ethereum's achievements and that the Ethereum community sometimes lacks a competitive spirit. However, with Ethereum's on-chain activity reaching historic highs, Circle's public listing pushing stablecoins into the mainstream, and a new collaboration between X and Polymarket, Ethereum is gradually balancing creativity with competitiveness.

data.title: Hut 8 Warns Against Fraudulent Activities in Brazil, South Korea, and Hong Kong
data.description: According to PANews, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Hut 8 has issued a warning about fraudulent activities involving individuals impersonating company representatives in Brazil, South Korea, and Hong Kong. The company clarified that it currently does not operate or have authorized representatives in these regions. Hut 8 urged community members to remain vigilant and cautious to avoid falling victim to scams.

data.title: Tether's custodial wallet deposited 200 BTC to Binance 8 hours ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the on-chain analysis platform @lookonchain, the Tether custodial wallet deposited 200 BTC worth about $20.88 million to Binance 8 hours ago. Since the BTC price rebounded to $100,000 on May 9, the wallet has deposited 1,650 BTC (about $174.7 million) to Binance.

data.title: Mempool Warns Against Phishing Scams Using Its Logo
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mempool, the official Bitcoin memory pool and blockchain explorer, has announced that it does not offer any 'crypto recovery services.' The project warns that any phishing emails claiming to be from 'mempool recovery' and using its logo are fraudulent. The community is advised to remain vigilant and avoid interacting with unverified links.

data.title: Metaplanet announces opening of US headquarters in Miami
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Simon Gerovich, CEO of Metaplanet, a Japanese listed company that adopts a Bitcoin reserve strategy, announced on the X platform that the company has established its US headquarters in Miami. Metaplanet previously announced a financing plan of up to US$5.4 billion, intending to acquire a total of 210,000 BTC by the end of 2027.
